title: Verify cross-layer coherence
description: Trace one update through every cache layer and document the converged staleness window.
body: Steps: 1. List every layer holding a copy (browser, CDN, app, DB buffer). 2. Trace a single update and confirm each layer refreshes or expires. 3. Identify any layer that cannot be purged on demand and record its TTL as the staleness floor. 4. Update a value and read back through every layer. 5. Document the end-to-end worst-case staleness. Rollback point: before shortening a layer's TTL under load. Validation: a post-update read through all layers converges within the documented window.
